# hooks-auth-one-time-token

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for oneTimeToken

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useOneTimeTokenMutation(); mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```

## Examples

### Use useOneTimeTokenMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useOneTimeTokenMutation();
mutate({ input: '<value>' });
```
